summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification for five open PRs. No shared canonical was chosen because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or raise-PR action is recommended from this artifact.

actions.reason: Unique doctor/gateway work with conflicts and proof needs; not a duplicate or close candidate in this inventory shard.
Focused but still active PR with failing checks and waiting-on-author signal; keep independently for maintainer/author follow-up.
Small plausible bug-fix PR, but proof is failing and no hydrated canonical replacement exists; keep independently.
Large independent feature/runtime-contract PR with failed docs check and proof/compatibility risk labels; no close or canonical action is justified.
Narrow plausible bug-fix PR with unhydrated linked issue and failing checks; keep independently rather than planning closure or merge.
